title: আল জাজিরার ইনভেস্টিগেটিভ ইউনিট (আই-ইউনিট)-এর অনুসন্ধানে উঠে এসেছে বাংলাদেশের সাব...
description: আল জাজিরার ইনভেস্টিগেটিভ ইউনিট (আই-ইউনিট)-এর অনুসন্ধানে উঠে এসেছে বাংলাদেশের সাবেক প্রধানমন্ত্রী শেখ হাসিনা কর্তৃক, ২০২৪ এর রক্তাক্ত ছাত্র আন্দোলন দমনের লক্ষ্যে নির্দয় গোপন নির্দেশাবলির বিস্তারিত। #হাসিনা৩৬জুলাই

title: Both the BNP and Jamaat have suffered the most during the 16-year rule of the Aw...
description: Both the BNP and Jamaat have suffered the most during the 16-year rule of the Awami League. Millions of their supporters and party members spent years in prison on trumped-up charges. Thousands became victims of enforced disappearances and extrajudicial killings. If Bangladesh Nationalist Party-BNP government fails to confirm universal protection of human rights and fails to form a functioning, independent human rights commission—and Bangladesh Jamaat-e-Islami, as the main opposition, fails to ensure that it happens—then both parties will be seen as morally bankrupt. The same goes for the judicial system. The judiciary must never become a stooge of the ruling party. BNP top brass must understand that this is your one chance to demonstrate you really care. Do not fail your men. They didn't suffer for decades just to watch you turn soft. Do not fail the people who went all out to elect you to run the country.
